title: [spec-compliance] TDMA slot hash input mixing (XOR vs concat) mismatches vectors
description: Commits touching lichen/subsys/lichen/link/* (9b7b84d45) and rust/lichen-node/src/tdma_scheduler.rs implement inconsistent slot=hash(EUI^epoch) vs concat per ccp_tdma.json and spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. C/Rust/Python differ for epoch !=0; violates MUST match test vectors. Priority 1 bug.
